violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee put on gloves without washing his hands. Observed another employee put on hand sanitizer when switching gloves.. Hands should be washed before putting gloves on and between glove changes. Hand sanitizer can not be used as a substitute for hand washing.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee drinks were observed on shelving unit in the kitchen with clean linens. Personal items should be stored separate from items used for food service.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
